name: ABB Ltd.
lede: ABB runs four centers across three Indian cities. Bengaluru, Chennai and Hyderabad, covering GBS, R&D and engineering & design, built over 24 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one ABB office in India. We map four, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: ABB Ltd. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: ABB runs 4 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad), covering GBS, R&D and engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: ABB's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Chennai and Hyderabad, spanning GBS, R&D and engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 204 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does ABB operate in India?
faq.a: ABB operates 4 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does ABB have centers in?
faq.a: ABB's India footprint includes Bengaluru and 2 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does ABB run in India?
faq.a: ABB runs GBS and 2 additional center types in India.

faq.q: How many people work at ABB's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for ABB's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads ABB's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at ABB's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
